topic: 30s aur 40s yarn count ka matlab — patla aur mota fabric aise banta hai
prompts: Close-up shot of Indian man's hand holding a smartphone to his ear, other hand holding two white plain round-neck t-shirts side by side showing texture difference, indoor warehouse setting with stacked t-shirt bundles visible in soft focus background, warm overhead lighting, camera slightly tilts down to focus on the t-shirts, vertical 9:16 format, realistic business environment, no faces visible

Overhead flat lay shot of two white plain cotton t-shirts laid side by side on a wooden table surface, left one slightly thicker looking fabric, right one visibly smoother texture, Indian warehouse background slightly blurred, natural daylight from window, camera slowly pushes in to show fabric texture detail, vertical 9:16 ratio, clean product comparison aesthetic, no text or labels visible

Extreme close-up macro shot of two white cotton fabric textures side by side, left showing thicker thread weave pattern of 30s yarn, right showing finer tighter weave of 40s yarn, camera slowly panning right to left across the texture boundary, bright diffused lighting to show thread detail clearly, shallow depth of field, vertical format, textile manufacturing detail focus

Close-up of Indian person's hands stretching and feeling a smooth white combed cotton t-shirt fabric between fingers, testing the softness and thickness, warm indoor lighting in a Tiruppur textile warehouse setting, slight camera dolly forward, fabric shows premium smooth texture, hands gently rubbing fabric to demonstrate quality, vertical 9:16 format, realistic testing scenario, no face visible

Medium shot of neatly folded stack of premium white plain round-neck t-shirts on a clean warehouse table, top t-shirt showing smooth 40s combed cotton texture, soft warm lighting from above, camera slowly dollies forward while slightly tilting down, background shows organized textile warehouse with fabric rolls, satisfying organized premium product display, vertical format, professional wholesale environment aesthetic

topic: 200 GSM sweet spot hai printing ke liye — na mota na patla
prompts: Close-up shot of an Indian man's hand holding a smartphone showing a customer complaint message on screen, other hand tapping the phone screen in frustration, sitting at a wooden office desk with fabric samples scattered around, warm afternoon lighting through window, shallow depth of field, slight camera push-in to emphasize the phone screen, realistic textile business office setting, vertical 9:16 format.

Flat lay overhead shot of three white plain cotton round-neck t-shirts laid horizontally on a light gray surface, each labeled with small fabric tags showing 180, 200, and 220 GSM numbers, Indian man's hands entering frame from top to arrange them neatly in a row, soft diffused lighting from above, camera static overhead view, textile warehouse aesthetic, vertical 9:16 format.

Close-up shot of Indian man's hands holding a 180 GSM white t-shirt up against bright window light, fabric slightly transparent with light passing through showing shadow of hand behind it, then switching to hold a 200 GSM t-shirt which blocks more light, indoor natural lighting, camera angle from front showing the transparency difference, slow movement comparing both fabrics, vertical 9:16 format.

Medium shot of a white 200 GSM cotton t-shirt laid flat on a printing table with a freshly screen-printed bold black graphic design on the chest area, Indian man's hands smoothing the print gently to show the solid opaque finish, professional printing studio lighting with warm overhead lights, camera slow tilt down from collar to print area, realistic textile printing workshop environment, vertical 9:16 format.

Close-up shot of Indian man's hands holding up a completed 200 GSM white t-shirt with vibrant multicolor DTG print on front, gently stretching the fabric to show the print quality and fabric opacity, soft natural daylight from side window creating subtle shadows, camera slightly rotating around the t-shirt to show texture and finish, satisfied gesture of hands inspecting quality, vertical 9:16 format.

topic: Bamboo cotton blend trending hai — par printing ke liye theek hai ya nahi
prompts: Close-up shot of Indian man's hands holding a light beige bamboo cotton blend t-shirt with visible cracked DTG print on the chest area, fingers pointing to the cracks and faded portions, warm indoor lighting with soft shadows, camera slowly pushes in to show print damage details, textile warehouse background slightly blurred, vertical 9:16 format

Medium shot of neatly folded stack of 8-10 bamboo cotton blend t-shirts in pastel colors on a wooden table in Indian textile warehouse, hand enters frame and picks up the top t-shirt to unfold it, examining the fabric texture, bright natural window lighting from the side, slight camera tilt down following the hand movement, vertical format

Split comparison shot showing two t-shirts side by side on a plain white surface, left side is bamboo cotton blend with smooth shiny finish, right side is pure combed cotton with matte texture, Indian man's hands touch both fabrics simultaneously to show texture difference, overhead camera angle, even studio lighting, vertical 9:16 format

Close-up shot of DTG printing machine nozzle spraying pre-treatment liquid onto a stretched bamboo blend t-shirt on the platen, droplets visible on fabric surface with uneven absorption creating slight dark patches, industrial workshop lighting, camera angle from 45 degrees showing the spray pattern, slight slow motion effect, vertical format

Overhead flat lay of three perfectly printed white pure cotton t-shirts with crisp vibrant DTG prints intact, laid on clean white table, Indian man's hand enters frame placing a quality check card next to them, bright clean lighting showing the print clarity, camera slowly zooms out to show all three shirts, vertical 9:16 format

topic: DTF printing ka fayda — dark fabric pe bhi sharp colors aate hain
prompts: Close-up shot of Indian man's hands holding a black cotton round-neck t-shirt with a dull, faded red DTG print on the chest area, examining it under bright workshop lighting, fingers pointing at the washed-out color, slight camera zoom in to emphasize the poor print quality, vertical 9:16 format, well-lit from frame one

Medium shot of a printing workshop table with a black plain cotton t-shirt laid flat, DTF transfer film sheet placed beside it showing a vibrant multicolor design with visible white underbase layer, warm LED lighting overhead, camera slowly pans right to show both items side by side, vertical 9:16 format, clear visibility from first frame

Close-up overhead shot of Indian man's hands peeling off a DTF transfer film from a navy blue cotton t-shirt, revealing a bright yellow and red printed design underneath with sharp edges and vivid colors, heat press machine visible in soft focus background, natural workshop lighting, camera tilts slightly as hands lift the film, vertical 9:16 format, bright scene from start

Close-up shot of two black cotton t-shirts hanging side by side on a chrome rack, left one has a dull pink DTG print, right one has a bright pink DTF print with glossy finish, Indian man's hand enters frame and points to highlight the color difference between both prints, soft daylight from window, slight camera dolly forward, vertical 9:16 format, well-exposed from first frame

Overhead flat lay shot of three dark colored cotton t-shirts laid on a white table, one black with vibrant green DTF print, one charcoal grey with sharp orange DTF design, one navy blue with bright white DTF logo, all prints looking crisp and colorful, warm indoor lighting casting soft shadows, camera slowly zooms out to show all three, vertical 9:16 format, clear bright scene from beginning

topic: Pique fabric polo ke liye best hai — smooth fabric pe polo mat banao
prompts: Close-up shot of Indian man's hands holding a light grey polo t-shirt with visible collar, fingers pointing at the collar area showing it drooping limply, warm indoor warehouse lighting, camera slowly pushing in to emphasize the problem, fabric texture visible showing smooth jersey material instead of textured pique, frustration visible in hand gesture.

Overhead flat lay shot of two polo t-shirts placed side by side on a clean white wooden surface, left one is smooth jersey fabric polo in navy blue, right one is textured pique fabric polo in white, both collars visible at top, natural daylight from window, camera static showing clear comparison between the two fabric types.

Extreme close-up macro shot moving slowly across pique fabric surface of a white polo t-shirt, honeycomb texture clearly visible with small raised squares creating breathable structure, warm studio lighting creating shadows that highlight the 3D texture, camera dolly movement from left to right revealing the distinctive pique weave pattern, fabric laying flat on dark surface.

Medium shot of Indian man's hands pressing down on collar of two different polo t-shirts on a table, left hand pressing smooth jersey polo collar showing it staying flat and limp, right hand pressing pique polo collar showing it bouncing back upright, indoor workshop lighting, camera angle from 45 degrees above showing the stiffness difference clearly.

Close-up shot of Indian man's hands holding up a premium white pique fabric polo t-shirt against blurred warehouse background with stacked t-shirt bundles, collar standing perfectly upright and crisp, fingers running along the textured honeycomb surface showing quality, warm golden hour lighting from side, camera slowly pulling back to reveal full polo shape with maintained structure.

topic: Polyester blend tshirt pe DTG mat karo — ink absorb nahi hoti
prompts: Close-up shot of Indian man's hands holding a light grey polyester blend t-shirt with visible shiny synthetic texture, fingers rubbing the smooth slippery fabric surface showing its synthetic feel, indoor workshop lighting, camera slowly zooms in on the fabric texture, vertical 9:16 format, immediate bright start from frame 1

Medium shot of a printing workshop table with a white polyester blend t-shirt laid flat, a DTG printer head moving across the fabric surface applying colorful ink design, visible ink droplets sitting on top of the fabric surface instead of soaking in, warm workshop lighting, slight camera tilt down, vertical 9:16 format

Overhead flat lay shot of two t-shirts placed side by side on a wooden table, left one is shiny polyester blend with ink sitting on surface showing droplet beads, right one is matte cotton fabric with ink absorbed into fibers, hands pointing to show the difference, bright even lighting, vertical 9:16 format

Close-up shot of Indian man's hands holding a dropper applying water-based DTG ink drops onto a polyester blend fabric swatch, ink visibly beading up and rolling off the smooth surface instead of absorbing, contrasted with cotton swatch next to it where ink soaks in immediately, indoor lighting, camera locked steady, vertical 9:16 format

Medium shot of neatly folded stack of 7-8 pure white 100% cotton round-neck t-shirts on a clean table, Indian man's hand placing the top shirt down showing the soft matte cotton texture, subtle camera dolly forward, warm professional lighting, vertical 9:16 format, clear bright opening from frame 1

topic: Fabric ka shrinkage direction — length mein zyada hota hai width mein kam

Medium shot of two identical white plain cotton round-neck t-shirts hanging side by side on black plastic hangers against a white wall, left one appears slightly longer than right one, warm indoor lighting, camera slowly pans from left to right comparing the lengths, vertical 9:16 format, clear visibility from frame one

Overhead flat lay shot of a plain white cotton t-shirt laid flat on a wooden measuring table with a yellow measuring tape placed vertically along the center showing length measurement, then another measuring tape placed horizontally across chest showing width, hands adjusting the tapes for accuracy, bright even lighting, vertical 9:16 format, action visible immediately

Close-up shot of Indian man's hands holding a white plain t-shirt over a large stainless steel washing basin filled with water, dipping the t-shirt into water for pre-wash treatment, water ripples visible, warm indoor lighting with industrial warehouse background slightly blurred, camera angle slightly tilted downward, vertical 9:16 format, clear scene from start

Medium shot of neatly folded stack of 6-7 white pre-shrunk plain cotton t-shirts on a wooden table, Indian man's hands placing one more perfectly folded t-shirt on top of the stack with confident smooth motion, warm golden hour lighting from side window, clean professional look, vertical 9:16 format, well-lit and sharp from first frame

topic: Mercerized cotton ka lustre alag hota hai — premium feel instantly
prompts: Close-up shot of Indian man's hands holding two white round-neck t-shirts side by side against a neutral grey background, one with visible shiny mercerized lustre reflecting light, the other with a matte dull finish, natural daylight from the side creating clear contrast, camera slowly pushing in to emphasize the surface difference, warm indoor lighting, vertical 9:16 format

topic: Fabric ka GSM check karne ka tarika — round cutter aur scale se
prompts: Close-up shot of Indian man's hands holding a thin white cotton round-neck t-shirt and a thicker grey t-shirt side by side, comparing the fabric thickness by touch, indoor workshop lighting with wooden table visible in background, hands squeezing both fabrics to show the visible difference in weight and density, slight camera push-in focusing on the texture contrast, realistic textile business environment.

Medium overhead shot of a clean workshop table surface with a professional round fabric cutter tool placed next to a digital weighing scale, bright even lighting from above, a folded white plain t-shirt visible on the side, the round cutter is metallic with sharp circular blade clearly visible, scale display showing zero, realistic Indian textile workshop setup with subtle fabric texture visible on table.

Close-up shot of Indian man's hands firmly pressing down a round fabric cutter onto a spread-out white cotton fabric on a flat table, applying pressure to cut through the material cleanly, warm indoor lighting, camera angle from 45 degrees showing the circular cutting motion, fabric is smooth and wrinkle-free under the cutter, realistic workshop environment with focus on the precision cutting action.

Extreme close-up shot of a small circular fabric piece being carefully placed on a digital weighing scale, the scale display clearly showing 2.0 grams in red digital numbers, Indian man's fingers gently releasing the fabric sample, bright focused lighting on the scale, white background with shallow depth of field blurring the background, realistic precision measurement scene in textile quality control setting.

Medium shot of a clean workshop table with neatly stacked premium quality plain white and grey cotton t-shirts arranged in organized piles, round cutter and digital scale placed professionally beside them, warm golden hour lighting streaming from window creating soft shadows, camera slow dolly right showing the professional setup, realistic successful textile business inventory display with quality assurance tools visible.
